scripts.test: API_KEY=${API_KEY:-api-key} artillery run --environment ${LOAD_TYPE:-validation} --output report.json --target ${API_HOST:-http://localhost:3000} test.yml && npm run report
scripts.test:scenario: API_KEY=${API_KEY:-api-key} artillery run --scenario-name "${SCENARIO}" --environment ${LOAD_TYPE:-validation} --output report.json --target ${API_HOST:-http://localhost:3000} test.yml && npm run report
scripts.test:crud-only: SCENARIO='User CRUD lifecycle' npm run test:scenario
